'''wopafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jeasley|jeasley]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-p-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jeasley|jeasley]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wopafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wopafithi|wopafithi]] || [[word:wopafiji|wopafiji]] || [[word:wopafishi|wopafishi]] || [[word:wopafiki|wopafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wopafuthuthu|wopafuthuthu]] || [[word:wopafujuju|wopafujuju]] || [[word:wopafushushu|wopafushushu]] || [[word:wopafukuku|wopafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wopafuthu|wopafuthu]] || [[word:wopafuju|wopafuju]] || [[word:wopafushu|wopafushu]] || [[word:wopafuku|wopafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wopafufthuf|wopafufthuf]] || [[word:wopafufjuf|wopafufjuf]] || [[word:wopafufshuf|wopafufshuf]] || [[word:wopafufkuf|wopafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wopafethe|wopafethe]] || [[word:wopafeje|wopafeje]] || [[word:wopafeshe|wopafeshe]] || [[word:wopafeke|wopafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wopafothotho|wopafothotho]] || [[word:wopafojojo|wopafojojo]] || [[word:wopafoshosho|wopafoshosho]] || [[word:wopafokoko|wopafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wopafotho|wopafotho]] || [[word:wopafojo|wopafojo]] || [[word:wopafosho|wopafosho]] || [[word:wopafoko|wopafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wopafofthof|wopafofthof]] || [[word:wopafofjof|wopafofjof]] || [[word:wopafofshof|wopafofshof]] || [[word:wopafofkof|wopafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wopafÃŸfthÃŸf|wopafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wopafÃŸfjÃŸf|wopafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wopafÃŸfshÃŸf|wopafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wopafÃŸfkÃŸf|wopafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wopafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|wopafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wopafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|wopafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wopafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|wopafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wopafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|wopafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wopafÃŸfthÃŸf|wopafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wopafÃŸfjÃŸf|wopafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wopafÃŸfshÃŸf|wopafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wopafÃŸfkÃŸf|wopafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wopafÃŸfthÃŸf|wopafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wopafÃŸfjÃŸf|wopafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wopafÃŸfshÃŸf|wopafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wopafÃŸfkÃŸf|wopafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wopafÃḊthÃḊ|wopafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:wopafÃḊjÃḊ|wopafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:wopafÃḊshÃḊ|wopafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:wopafÃḊkÃḊ|wopafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wopafathatha|wopafathatha]] || [[word:wopafajaja|wopafajaja]] || [[word:wopafashasha|wopafashasha]] || [[word:wopafakaka|wopafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wopafatha|wopafatha]] || [[word:wopafaja|wopafaja]] || [[word:wopafasha|wopafasha]] || [[word:wopafaka|wopafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wopafafthaf|wopafafthaf]] || [[word:wopafafjaf|wopafafjaf]] || [[word:wopafafshaf|wopafafshaf]] || [[word:wopafafkaf|wopafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wopafasha|wopafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wopafshÃḋsha|wopafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wopafrosha|wopafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wopafmusha|wopafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wopafyasha|wopafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowopafnkshÃḋsha|gowopafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowopafnkrosha|gowopafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowopafnkmusha|gowopafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowopafnkyasha|gowopafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wopapafasha|wopapafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wopapafshÃḋsha|wopapafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wopapafrosha|wopapafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wopapafmusha|wopapafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wopapafyasha|wopapafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowopapafnkshÃḋsha|gowopapafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowopapafnkrosha|gowopapafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowopapafnkmusha|gowopapafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowopapafnkyasha|gowopapafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wepÃḊfasha|wepÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wepÃḊfshÃḋsha|wepÃḊfshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wepÃḊfrosha|wepÃḊfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wepÃḊfmusha|wepÃḊfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wepÃḊfyasha|wepÃḊfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowepÃḊfnkshÃḋsha|gowepÃḊfnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowepÃḊfnkrosha|gowepÃḊfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowepÃḊfnkmusha|gowepÃḊfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowepÃḊfnkyasha|gowepÃḊfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wopfafasha|wopfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wopfafshÃḋsha|wopfafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wopfafrosha|wopfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wopfafmusha|wopfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wopfafyasha|wopfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowopfafnkshÃḋsha|gowopfafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowopfafnkrosha|gowopfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowopfafnkmusha|gowopfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowopfafnkyasha|gowopfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
